body:
mistress-of-the-dyke:

craving my girl in a short skirt or dress while she does housework.. i’d do anything to see her bend over to pick something up and notice she’s not wearing any panties

heaven is real and the closest i can get to being there is when i’m sliding my hands under her clothes
